name: Flight delay — travel insurance claim
description: User's international flight was delayed by 12 hours

input.message: My flight from Delhi to London was delayed by 12 hours. I had to spend extra on food and a hotel room at the airport. Can I claim this under my travel insurance?

notes: Most travel policies cover flight delay after 6-12 hours. Covers meals, accommodation, essential purchases. Need: airline delay certificate, receipts, boarding pass. Amount typically capped (₹5,000-15,000 per incident).
